blended.narrative: Mt. Bachelor is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 17 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,183 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.7" of snow, highs of 25°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 14".
